nasb.text: They said to her, “You are out of your mind!” But she kept insisting that it was so. They kept saying, “It is his angel.”

esv.text: They said to her, “You are out of your mind.” But she kept insisting that it was so, and they kept saying, “It is his angel!”

cnv.text: 大家說：“你瘋了！”她卻堅持地說這是真的。他們說：“一定是他的天使。”

ccb.text: 他们说：“你一定疯了。”她坚持说：“是真的！”他们就说：“是他的天使吧！”

csbs.text: 他们对罗妲说：“你疯了！”可是她坚持就是如此。他们不住地说：“那是他的天使。”
